description.value: Aura moderate varies; CL 9th; Slot none; Price 81,766 gp; Weight 5 lbs. DESCRIPTION Smoky spirals adorn the length of this staff, and have an almost hypnotic effect. The staff allows use of the following spells: Deep slumber (1 charge) Ray of exhaustion (1 charge) Dream (2 charges) Nightmare (2 charges) Waves of fatigue (2 charges) Symbol of sleep (3 charges) CONSTRUCTION REQUIREMENTS Feats Craft Staff; Spells deep slumber, dream, nightmare, symbol of sleep, ray of exhaustion, waves of fatigue; Cost 49,216 gp.
